problem: Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared?
hypothesis: Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells may resolve Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared? by blocking at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 22 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
